name: ScheduledTasks
summary: The ScheduledTasks collector shows the status of scheduled tasks on devices, and also when it is scheduled to run next.

fields.name: folder
fields.description: The path from where the scheduled task runs (Empty in Linux).

fields.name: nextruntime
fields.description: Time and date when the task will run.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current task status can be ready , disabled , setting , running , or could not start .

fields.name: task_run
fields.description: Full command line to execute tasks.

fields.name: last_run
fields.description: Last time the task ran successfully.

fields.name: username
fields.description: Name of the user that executed the task.

fields.name: log_on_type
fields.description: Security logon method required to run tasks. See Log on Type documentation (Windows only).

examples.title: Example: Show when will the task called 'backupDaily' run next
examples.v2_query: ScheduledTasks taskname, nextruntime where ScheduledTasks taskname equals "backupDaily"
